description: Issue a short-lived signed JWT (service-auth) for the authenticated user, addressed to a named service DID.

main.description: Returns a JWT signed by the caller's atproto signing key. Used for inter-service authentication.

aud.description: The DID of the service that the token will be authenticated against.

exp.description: Desired expiration time as a Unix timestamp (seconds). Capped at 30 minutes from now.

lxm.description: Lexicon method NSID the token should be restricted to.

errors.name: BadExpiration
errors.description: exp is in the past or beyond the allowed ceiling.

errors.name: NoSigningKey
errors.description: The caller has no signing key on this PDS.
